testcase.name: setup

error.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. null Host info: host: 'SHAURYA', ip: '192.168.1.4' Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.18' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [], extensions: []}}]}] Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [], extensions: []}}
